Home.bio1: I love turning ideas into digital experiences that are both beautiful and functional. My work focuses on creating responsive web interfaces, designing intuitive user experiences, and continuously exploring new technologies to build better products.
Home.bio2: As a Frontend Developer and UI/UX Designer, I enjoy transforming complex problems into simple, elegant, and user-friendly solutions. Beyond development, I also create beauty content, where creativity and visual storytelling inspire the way I approach every project.
Home.bio3: Currently, I'm expanding my knowledge in Artificial Intelligence, exploring how AI can enhance web applications and create smarter, more personalized user experiences.
Home.skillsSubtitle: Technologies I use daily to build digital products.

About.title: About
About.subtitle: A brief introduction about who I am.
About.bio1: Hello! I'm Anindita Amanta Runa, better known as Jiegle, a Frontend Developer, UI/UX Designer, and Beauty Content Creator who enjoys combining creativity with technology to create engaging and meaningful digital experiences.
About.bio2: I focus on developing modern web interfaces using React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, with high attention to detail, performance, and user experience. I believe that good design is not only visually beautiful, but also able to solve problems and provide a comfortable experience for every user.
About.bio3: Besides developing applications, I'm also active as a beauty content creator. The creative world has taught me the importance of storytelling, aesthetics, and understanding audience needs — things I also apply to every digital product I build.
About.bio4: Currently, I'm deepening my understanding of Artificial Intelligence to explore how AI technology can be integrated with web development and design to create smarter and more innovative solutions.
About.bio5: As a responsible, creative, and detail-oriented person, I always enjoy the learning process, experimenting with new technologies, and turning ideas into functional, intuitive, and enjoyable digital products.
About.career_subtitle: My professional journey and organizational experience.
About.resp_osis_1: Managed budgeting and financial administration for Student Council activities.
About.resp_osis_2: Maintained accurate financial records, including income and expenditure tracking.
About.resp_osis_3: Prepared financial statements and budget reports for organizational programs.
About.resp_osis_4: Coordinated budget planning with committee members for school events.
About.resp_osis_5: Ensured financial transparency and compliance throughout all activities.
